indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and comfortable, but it is not suitable for computer work due to its size and potential distractions.

indicators.name: window-blind
indicators.rationale: The window blinds can be adjusted to control the amount of natural light, which is beneficial for computer work.

indicators.name: cabinet
indicators.rationale: The cabinet is large and could be used for storage, but it is not directly related to computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a comfortable bed and adjustable window blinds, but the large cabinet and the size of the bed could be distracting.
